creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #10)
>> files/patch-mozilla-release_media_mtransport_third__party_nICEr_src_stun_stun.h
>
> Slightly different version landed upstream.
> https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1575876

Since this fix won't be ported back to 68.x.y this patch needs to remain in www/cliqz until cliqz updates their Firefox core to 69.

>(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #8)
>> the package list for our firefox packages may need additions
>
> www/firefox and www/cliqz are structured differently, so changes in one does not > necessary need to be copied to the other.

I guess www/cliqz can share the <package> entry in vuln.xml with the same <topic> containing www/firefox since www/cliqz keep track of upstream www/firefox. Let me know if this is alright.
